title: agentic.intent.escalated v1
description: Emitted when agent confidence falls below threshold and the conversation is escalated to a human agent. Source: alebrije-mod-agentic (Python).

intent.description: Detected intent label that could not be handled with sufficient confidence.

confidence_score.description: Classifier confidence at time of escalation.

escalation_reason.description: Categorical reason: low_confidence | ambiguous_intent | out_of_scope | user_requested.

agent_id.description: Agent instance that was handling the session.
